Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You maneuver yourself around a planter's stone frame, twisting around and across to a raised section of wood behind it. During your acrobatics, you notice that French Kweebec is beaming a strange expression your way.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He seems to appreciate the fact that you are taking care not to destroy his plants, but he's lost as to why you're messing around in the first place.

Line.Text: Mon ami, if you wish to pass by, you can just go around the--
